ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "game_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team plays in */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team is in */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team is in */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the event occurred */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period in which the event occurred */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time at which the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., foul, turnover) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the event */,
  "location_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the event location */,
  "location_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the event location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fouls" (
  "foul_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each foul */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game event that resulted in the foul */,
  "foul_type" TEXT /* Type of foul (e.g., personal, shooting) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who committed the foul */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that committed the foul */,
  "foul_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the foul */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("foul_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fouls_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES game_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turnovers" (
  "turnover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnover */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game event that resulted in the turnover */,
  "turnover_type" TEXT /* Type of turnover (e.g., traveling, lost ball) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who committed the turnover */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that committed the turnover */,
  "turnover_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the turnover */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnover_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnovers_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES game_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shots" (
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game event that resulted in the shot */,
  "shot_type" TEXT /* Type of shot (e.g., 2PT, 3PT) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who took the shot */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that took the shot */,
  "shot_distance" REAL /* Distance of the shot */,
  "shot_made" INTEGER /* Whether the shot was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES game_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_event_players" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platform_performance" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., data ingestion rate, query performance) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "recorded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
